case_title: VINH L. QUACH VS. GOOGLE INC. DBA GOOGLE EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-01-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOOGLE INC. DBA GOOGLE EXPRESS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY QUACH, VINH L. AS TO DEFENDANT GOOGLE INC. DBA GOOGLE EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GOOGLE INC. DBA GOOGLE EXPRESS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUACH, VINH L. AS TO DEFENDANT GOOGLE INC. DBA GOOGLE EXPRESS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOOGLE WAS PRESENT REPRESENTED Y KATHRYN LLAVOIE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOOGLE INC. DBA GOOGLE EXPRESS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUACH, VINH L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOOGLE INC. DBA GOOGLE EXPRESS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
